title: Encounter
description: The live state of one trainee triaging one case. Owned by the backend sim state machine; the frontend renders it and posts actions against it. This is the wire format for GET /encounters/{id}.

caseId.description: The TriageCase being triaged. Expert labels stay server-side until stage == FEEDBACK.

stage.description: Current workflow stage. Transitions are enforced server-side; the client cannot skip ahead.

chiefComplaint.description: Echoed from the case so the client need not hold the case.

history.description: The history-taking transcript between trainee and LLM patient.

measuredVitals.description: Vitals the trainee has chosen to measure. Unmeasured fields are null. Mirrors TriageCase vitals shape.

esiAssigned.description: Trainee's ESI decision; null until ESI_ASSIGNMENT submitted.

interventionsOrdered.description: Critical interventions the trainee initiated. Compared to expert list in scoring.
